title: Mono-material snack pouch pilots accelerate in North America
summary: Converters are expanding pilots around PE-heavy snack structures as recyclability claims become easier to substantiate.

title: Food-contact declaration gaps remain a bottleneck for compostable films
summary: Material teams are finding strong sustainability scores but weaker documentation coverage across compostable film alternatives.

title: Barrier paper composites gain traction for chilled meal lidding
summary: Pack development teams are revisiting paper-composite structures where barrier performance and recycling routes are improving together.

title: Lead-time volatility rises for high-clarity flexible films
summary: Several suppliers are seeing quarter-over-quarter lead-time expansion for high-clarity flexible formats used in pouch and wrap applications.

title: Upcoming post-consumer content guidance is pushing reformulation planning earlier
summary: Teams are pulling compliance planning forward to avoid last-minute substitute screening once guidance activates.

title: Medical peel-pack suppliers emphasize evidence-ready certification bundles
summary: Supplier differentiation is shifting toward better documentation packaging rather than only material performance claims.
